title: File Storage Formats Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about the most common and useful file formats in modern web development.

questions.question: Which image format is generally best for high-detail photographs on the web?
What's the primary benefit of using a vector format like SVG?
options: It can scale to any size without losing quality.
It uses less memory than any other format.
It's the only way to store data in a database.
It's a requirement of all CSS frameworks.

questions.question: Which format is the most common for data exchange in modern full-stack applications?
What is the key characteristic of the WebP format?
options: It provides superior lossy and lossless compression for smaller file sizes compared to JPEG or PNG.
It's a type of database indexing.
It automatically generates a thumbail for each image.

questions.question: Which format should you use for fixed-layout documents that must look identical across all devices?
